```python
import sys

def shortest_palindrome(s):
    if not s:
        return ""
    
    # Create the modified string for KMP failure function
    t = s + '#' + s[::-1]
    failure = [0] * len(t)
    
    for i in range(1, len(t)):
        j = failure[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and t[i] != t[j]:
            j = failure[j - 1]
        if t[i] == t[j]:
            j += 1
        failure[i] = j
    
    # The length of the longest palindromic suffix
    longest_palindrome_suffix_length = failure[-1]
    
    # The part to prepend is the reverse of the remaining prefix
    return s[:len(s) - longest_palindrome_suffix_length][::-1] + s

def main():
    s = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    print(shortest_palindrome(s))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
